creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 163556
mygui.diff

I completely overlooked the portlint warnings and errors on my patch before submitting this PR...  Sorry.  I fixed them all now.

In other news OpenMW builds and runs on FreeBSD now :) See https://github.com/t6/wip-ports/tree/master/games/openmw and https://imgur.com/vrAi2t8
